title: Grilled Trout with Toastie Crust
description: A German-inspired dish featuring grilled trout and a crispy toastie crust.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Rinse the trout fillets and pat dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together the butter, parmesan, salt, and pepper.
Place a slice of bread on a flat surface and spread a quarter of the butter mixture on top.
Place a trout fillet on top of the bread and fold the bread over to form a crust.
Grill the trout for 4-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
